name: reset_ssn
short_description: Clear a SSN results set from memory
full_help:
reset_ssn

Description: 
Clear a SSN results set from memory

Syntax: 
reset_ssn  [-quiet] [-verbose] <name>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <name>      Name of the set of results

Categories: 
Report

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
